title: Codiva.dev | Custom web development and digital solutions
description: We build tailored websites, SaaS platforms, and scalable systems. Codiva.dev transforms complex ideas into secure, efficient, and growth-ready tech.

validation.tooShort: Too short. Please provide more detail.

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

about.title: We turn ideas into scalable digital solutions
about.paragraph1: At Codiva.dev, we bridge the gap between technical complexity and real-world execution. We help startups, founders, and teams bring ambitious ideas to life through secure, structured, and future-proof products.
about.paragraph2: We’re more than just developers — we work with you to build and evolve digital products that ship. Whether you’re starting from scratch or improving what’s already live, Codiva.dev brings clear execution, a sustainable pace, and a solid foundation to keep growing.

list.title: Web Essentials
list.description: Informational websites, landing pages, and responsive branding.

list.title: Apps & Systems
list.description: Web apps, SaaS platforms, and tailored backend systems.
details: Integration with Stripe, maps, and external services

list.title: Continuous improvement & support
list.description: Fixes, enhancements, and new capabilities on what’s already in production: bookings, payments, dashboards, and more.
details: Backlog prioritization and monthly or sprint-based delivery
Small features and integrations (APIs, payments, maps, etc.)
Direct communication with the people doing the work
extras: Extra capacity for launches or migrations

cases.title: Success stories
cases.description: These are some of the brands that trust us and some of the technologies that we used to develop their solutions.

list.name: Inquilia
list.description: Privacy-focused web application. AES-256 encrypted document upload with Supabase storage. Fast, intuitive, and secure.

list.name: CD648
list.description: Online reservation system for a boutique hotel. Real-time availability, integrated payments, and Google Maps connectivity.

list.name: Quimialcla
list.description: Corporate website for a chemical solutions company. Clear visual communication, efficient catalog, and quality standards focus.

quote.thankYou: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you soon.

quote.promptSubtitle: Choose the option that works best for you.

ticket.title: Report a ticket
ticket.subtitle: Include steps, URLs, and attach screenshots if relevant.

hints.attachments: Images and documents accepted. Max ~10MB per file.
hints.textarea: What you expected, what happened, steps to reproduce, screenshots/URLs…
